data.title: Apollo to acquire Bridge Investment Group for $1.5 billion
data.description:
• Apollo (NYSE:APO) and Bridge Investment Group (NYSE:BRDG) on Monday said they have signed a definitive agreement for Apollo to acquire Bridge in an all-stock transaction with an equity value of approximately $1.5 billion.
  • As per the terms of the transaction, Bridge stockholders and Bridge OpCo unit holders will receive 0.07081 shares of Apollo stock for each share of Bridge class A common stock and each Bridge OpCo class A common unit valued by the parties at $11.50 per each share, respectively.
  • As part of the deal, Bridge Executive Chairman Bob Morse will become an Apollo partner and head of its real-estate equity business.
  • Upon the closing of the transaction, Bridge will operate as a standalone platform within Apollo’s asset management business, retaining its existing brand, management team and dedicated capital formation team.
  • The company said Bridge Investment manages approximately $50 billion of high-quality AUM in real estate products targeting both institutional and wealth clients and is expected to be highly synergistic with Apollo’s existing real estate equity strategies and real estate credit platform.
  • Bridge will no longer be holding its fourth quarter and full-year 2024 earnings conference call and webcast scheduled for February 25, 2025, due to the pending transaction.
  • APO +0.29% premarket to $150.99.
  • Source: Press Release

data.title: Houston American Energy expands into renewable fuels with Abundia Global Impact deal
data.description:
Houston American Energy (NYSE:HUSA) +1.5% pre-market Monday after saying it agreed to acquire Abundia Global Impact Group, a company specializing in converting waste into high value fuels and chemicals, for an undisclosed sum.

Under the deal terms, Houston American (NYSE:HUSA) will acquire 100% of AGIG's issued and outstanding units from AGIG's members and will issue to AGIG's members a number of HUSA common shares equaling 94% of its aggregate issued and outstanding common stock at the time of the closing.

AGIG is preparing to build its first advanced plastic recycling facility in Cedar Port, Texas, which it said will become the hub for its five-year development plan in the U.S., designed to scale production capacity while maintaining capital discipline.

The two companies said they will continue to work towards a structured integration and execution plan, with additional updates expected in the coming months.

data.title: Airtel to offer Apple TV+, Apple Music to its Wi-Fi, postpaid customers
data.description:
• India's Bharti Airtel said it will offer Apple TV+ streaming services and Apple Music to some of its customers in India.
  • The firm said it has entered into a strategic partnership with Apple (NASDAQ:AAPL), which allows all Home Wi-Fi customers on plans starting at INR 999 to get access to Apple TV+.
  • The company added postpaid customers on plans starting at INR 999 will get access to Apple TV+ and can avail six months of free Apple Music.

data.title: Juggernaut Exploration announces share consolidation
data.description:
• Juggernaut Exploration (TSXV:JUGR:CA) on Monday said that it will consolidate its common shares on a 10-old-for-1-new share basis.
  • The 143M shares currently issued and outstanding will be reduced to about 14.3M post-consolidation shares.
  • Source: Press Release

data.title: Connexa Sports Technologies skyrockets on content creation agreement with TikTok
data.description:
• Connexa Sports Technologies (NASDAQ:YYAI) on Monday said that its majority-owned subsidiary, Yuanyu Enterprise Management (YYEM), has signed an multi-channel network agency services agreement to create and sell content to TikTok as part of its exciting new vertical centered on social networking applications.
  • Under this agreement, YYEM will procure the production of content to be live-streamed or served as videos to TikTok’s multitude of users in the Middle East and North Africa (MENA), which will include engaging broadcasts across various categories, such as sports, gaming, and lifestyle topics, produced by popular Twitch hosts and other influencers within the network that YYEM is developing.
  • The company expects YYEM’s new vertical to also include live-streaming, voice chat rooms, gaming, and influencer-driven user-generated content (UGC). The fees generated by the arrangement with TikTok will depend on the rate of conversion by TikTok end-users, the company said.
  • YYAI +64.03% premarket to $1.05.
  • Source: Press Release

data.title: Lincoln Educational Services GAAP EPS of $0.22 misses by $0.01, revenue of $119.4M beats by $8.55M
data.description:
• Lincoln Educational Services press release (NASDAQ:LINC): Q4 GAAP EPS of $0.22 misses by $0.01.
  • Revenue of $119.4M (+16.5% Y/Y) beats by $8.55M.
  • Student starts grew by 9.6%; quarter-end student population rose by 14.1%
  • The increase was primarily due to a 13.7% increase in average student population, driven by continued start growth of 9.6%, in addition to tuition increases quarter over quarter. Included in the increase was $4.4 million of revenue generated by the East Point, Georgia campus, which opened late in the first quarter of 2024.

data.title: RONN JV partner HES secures project agreement in South Korea
data.description:
• RONN (OTCPK:RONN) on Monday said its Joint Venture (JV) partner, Hydrogen Energy Systems (HES), has signed an agreement with a South Korean chemical company for a "mega project" aimed at large-scale production of hydrogen, ammonia, nitrogen, and urea.
  • The estimated project costs exceed $355 million, plus additional land procurement.
  • Under this agreement, HES and RONN will combine resources and expertise to design, engineer, and manage the project scope.
  • The company said the project will capitalize on growing demand for hydrogen.
  • "The HES/RONN JV stands to benefit from emerging opportunities in hydrogen-related projects around the globe. With the addition of ammonia, nitrogen, and urea production, the partnership expands into crucial sectors such as agriculture, heavy transport, and industrial manufacturing. These diverse revenue streams position both companies to capture a significant share of the booming hydrogen economy, which experts project could exceed USD $300 billion by 2030," the company said.
  • Source: Press Release

data.title: Bridge Investment jumps on report of Apollo $1.5B takeover
data.description:
Bridge Investment Group (NYSE:BRDG) soared 12% in premarket trading after a report that Apollo Global (NYSE:APO) is acquiring the real estate investment company for about $1.5 billion in stock. Its shares have since been halted due to news being pending.

As part of the deal, Bridge Executive Chairman Bob Morse will become an Apollo partner and head of its real-estate equity business, according to a WSJ report on Monday, which cited people familiar with the matter.

Bridge has a market cap of about $960 million.

Developing story ...

data.title: Equitable seeks to boost stake in AllanceBernstein after RGA reinsurance deal
data.description:
Equitable Holdings (NYSE:EQH) has entered a reinsurance deal with Reinsurance Group of America (NYSE:RGA) that will provide Equitable with capital to boost its stake in the operating partnership of AllianceBernstein Holding (NYSE:AB) to as much as 77.5% of AB from its current 61.9% stake and to buy back about $500M of EQH shares, the company said Monday.

AllianceBernstein Holding (NYSE:AB) stock gained 4.8%, while Equitable (NYSE:EQH) stock slid 4.8% in Monday premarket trading. Reinsuerance Group of America (NYSE:RGA) shares increased 0.6%.

Under the reinsurance agreement, RGA (RGA) will reinsure 75% of Equitable's (EQH) in-force individual life insurance block on a pro-rata basis and will generate more than $2B of value of Equitable, which includes a positive ceding commission and release of capital, Equitable said. The deal is expected to close in mid-2025.

"The transaction enhances our focus on Retirement, Asset Management, and Wealth Management, which are high return on capital businesses with attractive growth prospects where we have a clear right to win," said Equitable Holdings (EQH) President and CEO) Mark Pearson.

Equitable (EQH) has started a cash tender offer to buy up to 46M units of limited partnership interests in Alliance Bernstein Holding LP (AB), at a price of $38.50 per unit for an aggregate purchase price of ~$1.8B, less any applicable tax withholding, representing a 7.8% premium over AB Holding's closing price on Feb. 21. The units covered by the offering represents ~41.7% of AB Holding's currently outstanding units.

The offering isn't conditioned upon the receipt of financing or any minimum number of units being tendered.

Equitable (EQH) also plans to repurchase $500M of its shares, above its 60%-70% payout ratio target, after the close of the reinsurance deal.

Equitable (EQH) estimates a GAAP net loss at the close of the reinsurance transaction and a reduction in book value, excluding accumulated other comprehensive income. After redeployment of the capital, EQH expects the deal to have limited impact on non-GAAP operating earnings and cash generation to add to non-GAAP operating EPS.

For RGA (RGA), the deal is expected to contribute ~$70M of adjusted operating income before taxes in 2025, based on a mid-year closing date. Adjusted operating income before tax is expected to rise to $160M-$170M in 2026, and to ~$200M per year over time. RGA expects to finance the transaction from its excess capital and proceeds from a potential debt financing, subject to market conditions.

data.title: The Fresh Factory announces $3 million private placement
data.description:
• The Fresh Factory (TSXV:FRSH:CA) on Monday said it intends to complete a non-brokered private placement of up to 33,333 proportionate voting shares at $90 voting share for total gross proceeds of up to approximately $3 million.
  • The company intends to use the net proceeds from the offering to fund the growth and development of its business, including upgrades to its existing facility, and for general corporate and working capital purposes.
  • The company said the closing of the offering is expected to occur on or about March 10, 2025.
  • Source: Press Release
